channel.title: Comments on: Terrapin Brewing, Left Hand Brewing: Depth Charge, Ep. 84
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Todd
item.dc:creator: Todd
item.description: Dude.... John I love the Primo shirt!!! My Dad lived in Hawaii and all he drank was Primo, I really love your beer knowledge. I need to get out to Savanah, GA. Take Care.
item.content:encoded: Dude…. John I love the Primo shirt!!! My Dad lived in Hawaii and all he drank was Primo, I really love your beer knowledge. I need to get out to Savanah, GA. Take Care.

item.title: By: Video BrewMaster
item.dc:creator: Video BrewMaster
item.description: Thanks for the clarification and added info Steve! Terrapin is one of my favorite breweries and I'm extremely sad that I can't get it in Fort Worth where I live now.
item.content:encoded: Thanks for the clarification and added info Steve! Terrapin is one of my favorite breweries and I’m extremely sad that I can’t get it in Fort Worth where I live now.

item.title: By: Steve
item.dc:creator: Steve
item.description:
Hey guys, we'd love to have y'all in Athens sometime. So, please do plan that trip you were talking about.
As for the Depth Charge, glad you enjoyed it. It's been one of my favorite beers Spike has brewed of late. Concerning the coffee, he actually uses a course grind of the beans, no brewed coffee. Spike adds 1lb per barrel of beer added after fermentation, steeps for about 2 days, and then immediately packages for that rich coffee flavor.
Cheers!
item.content:encoded:
Hey guys, we’d love to have y’all in Athens sometime. So, please do plan that trip you were talking about.

As for the Depth Charge, glad you enjoyed it. It’s been one of my favorite beers Spike has brewed of late. Concerning the coffee, he actually uses a course grind of the beans, no brewed coffee. Spike adds 1lb per barrel of beer added after fermentation, steeps for about 2 days, and then immediately packages for that rich coffee flavor.

Cheers!

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description: Absolutely love the shirt John! Ah .... and this beer is amazing. I'm lucky to have a case of it in my cellar and am enjoying it immensely.
item.content:encoded: Absolutely love the shirt John! Ah …. and this beer is amazing. I’m lucky to have a case of it in my cellar and am enjoying it immensely.
